// Environment variables exposed for Next.js // This file is automatically generated by Next.js and contains public environment variables // DO NOT MODIFY THIS FILE MANUALLY // It is generated during the build process const __NEXT_DATA__ = { "props": { "pageProps": { "__NEXT_DATA__": { "page": "/", "query": {}, "buildId": "development", "isFallback": false, "gsp": true, "appGip": true, "componentLoadDelay": 0, "err": null, "routerState": { "locale": undefined, "locales": ["en"], "defaultLocale": "en" } } } }, "page": "/", "query": {}, "buildId": "development", "isFallback": false, "gsp": true, "appGip": true, "componentLoadDelay": 0, "err": null, "routerState": { "locale": undefined, "locales": ["en"], "defaultLocale": "en" }, "nextExport": false, "selfHasExport": false, "staticMarkup": true }; // Public runtime config (exposed to browser) window.__NEXT_DATA__ = __NEXT_DATA__; // Expose public environment variables window.__NEXT_DATA__.runtimeConfig = { "API_BASE_URL": "https://api.example.com", "NEXT_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_ID": "UA-123456789-1", "NEXT_PUBLIC_MAPBOX_TOKEN": "pk.eyJ1IjoidGVzdHVzZXIiLCJhIjoiY2tnbXAzcDJrMGhuMDJ3cGx4Y3A5b3JzaiJ9.abc123", "NEXT_PUBLIC_FEATURE_FLAG_NEW_UI": true, "NEXT_PUBLIC_ENABLE_DEBUG_LOGS": false, "NEXT_PUBLIC_VERSION": "1.2.3", "NEXT_PUBLIC_BUILD_TIMESTAMP": "2024-06-15T10:30:00Z" }; // Mock data for development if (process.env.NODE_ENV === 'development') { window.__NEXT_DATA__.devTools = { enabled: true, hotReload: true, errorOverlay: true }; } // Export for potential consumption if (typeof module !== 'undefined' && module.exports) { module.exports = window.__NEXT_DATA__; } else if (typeof define === 'function' && define.amd) { define(function() { return window.__NEXT_DATA__; }); } else { window.__NEXT_DATA = __NEXT_DATA__; }
